name: Ota.Http Request → Flash
description: This action triggers the download and installation of the updated firmware from the configured URL. As it's an ESPHome [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions), it may be used in any ESPHome [automation(s)](https://esphome.io/automations).

config_entries.label: Password
config_entries.description: The password to use for HTTP basic authentication.

config_entries.label: Username
config_entries.description: The username to use for HTTP basic authentication.

config_entries.label: Md5
config_entries.description:
**Required — set exactly one of:** `md5`, `md5_url`.

The [MD5sum](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Md5sum) of the firmware file pointed to by `url` (below). May not be used with `md5_url` (below); must be specified if `md5_url` is not.

config_entries.label: Md5 URL
config_entries.description:
**Required — set exactly one of:** `md5`, `md5_url`.

The URL of the file containing an [MD5sum](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Md5sum) of the firmware file pointed to by `url` (below). May not be used with `md5` (above); must be specified if `md5` is not.

config_entries.label: URL
config_entries.description: The URL of the binary file containing the (new) firmware to be installed.
